content: Ahora corrijo todos los bugs uno por uno:

args.Description: "Fix corrupt ticket emoji, add ID to search, add year to date separators. These were silent visual/functional bugs that would cause broken UI and failed searches."
args.Instruction: "Fix 4 bugs in app.js: 1) Fix corrupt emoji in ticket modal header, 2) Add ticket ID to search filter, 3) Add year to date separators in chat, 4) Fix PR priority badge missing bg property"
args.TargetFile: "c:\\Users\\Allenmar\\Documents\\Proyectos de AS Sierra Systems\\Administracion AS Sierra Systems\\frontend\\js\\app.js"
